name: Jujutsu Kaisen: Culling Games RPG
description:
[Enter the fray of the Culling Games!]

Are you a Curse User? A Jujutsu Sorcerer? An incarnated sorcerer from 1,000 years ago? An average Joe Schmo who just awakened a technique?

That's all your choice!

More specific from my last JJK bot, but since the reception has been good, that means by prompt wasn't trash. The Culling Games is my favorite JJK arc plot-wise, so I figured I'd make a bot out of it!

Also let me know if it doesn't work as well, this bot is more experimental compared to what I've done thus far.

Upcoming Bots:

Re:zero Bot: Where you take the role of Subaru as the holder of Return By Death (No ETA, haven't really started)


Fire Force RPG Bot: Self explainatory, but it might take a little while since I plan on going in-depth on the power system in the personality. Also haven't started this one, so idk when I'll finish it.

Pre-Timeskip One Piece Bot: An open world bot that will contain everything between the East Blue and Summit War Saga. The Strawhats still exist, so you can take the roll as a self-insert crewmate, or be a captain of a rival crew, or a member of another notorious pirate's crew. Or you can be Navy, it's all up to you, as always. But don't expect it too soon because I need to finish the arc, I've got like 40-something episodes left.
creator: Spingiss
